dc_description_s: This data represents zoning in Langlade County, Wisconsin in 2026 and includes the layers 'LANGLADE_AIRPORT_2026', 'LANGLADE_GENERAL_2026' and 'LANGLADE_SHORELAND_2026'. [AIRPORT: The Height Limitation Zoning Map for the Langlade County Airport is used to help with Chapter 17 of the Zoning Ordinance. The latest revision is by the Langlade County Board on 6/19/2018, Ordinance #4-2018. Within that document section 17.07 specifically begins to address Aiport-Related Regulations. This is not an exhaustive list of agencies involved in those choices creating the regulations. Location: 45°09′15″N 089°06′39″WCoordinate System: NAD_1983_HARN_WISCRS_Langlade_County_Feet]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
